description_long: This is a white ceramic cup featuring a stylized illustration of a dog's face on one side, with the name 'GRETA' written below in a decorative font. The opposite side of the cup displays the phrase 'World's Greatest Dog Mom' in elegant, cursive script. The cup has a rounded body and a polygonal handle, which is attached at the side for easy gripping. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware. The interior is plain and unadorned, suitable for holding beverages, while the exterior artwork adds a personalized and sentimental touch.
description: A white ceramic cup with a dog illustration and the text 'World's Greatest Dog Mom', featuring a polygonal handle and smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dog's face illustration and the name 'GRETA' beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the polygonal handle and a partial glimpse of the dog illustration.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the phrase 'World's Greatest Dog Mom' in cursive script.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain surface and a partial glimpse of the handle and artwork.
